refrig_upright.text: What is the current temperature reading on the display?
Is there an active alarm or warning on the unit?
Is there airflow blowing from the vents at eye level?
How many base fans underneath the unit are spinning?
Is there stagnant water visible near the base fans?
Is there visible damage at the base — broken fan or burnt motor smell?
Are the door seals closing and sealing correctly?

refrig_coldroom.text: What is the current temperature reading on the display?
Is there an active alarm or warning on the unit?
Are the blower fans inside the cold room spinning?
Is there ice build-up on the blower unit?
Are the cold room door seals intact and closing properly?
Is the compressor fan spinning on the exterior unit?

refrig_freezer.text: What is the current temperature reading on the display?
Is there an active alarm or warning on the unit?
Are the blower fans inside the freezer room spinning?
Is there ice build-up on the blower unit?
Is the compressor fan spinning on the exterior unit?

refrig_island.text: What is the current temperature reading on the display?
Is there an active alarm or warning on the unit?
Are the interior fans inside the island unit spinning?
Is there ice build-up on the interior evaporator?
Is the compressor fan spinning on the exterior or base unit?

refrig_serveover.text: What is the current temperature reading on the display?
Is there an active alarm or warning on the unit?
Are the interior fans inside the serve-over spinning?
Is there ice build-up on any internal surface?
Is the compressor fan spinning on the exterior or base unit?

electrical_lighting.text: Which area or circuit is affected?
Is there visible damage to fittings, wiring, or the light itself?
Are the lights flickering or intermittently cutting out?

electrical_sockets.text: Which socket or area is affected?
Is there visible damage to the socket — burn marks, cracks, or exposed parts?

electrical_db.text: Is a breaker at the DB board tripped or off?
Which circuit or label is the tripped breaker for?
Is there visible damage inside the DB board?

backup_generator.text: Is the generator starting and running?
What is the current fuel level?
Is the battery charged and all connections secure?
Are there error codes or warning lights on the display?

backup_ups.text: What is the UPS status indicator showing?
Is the battery charged and healthy?
Is the UPS providing stable output power?

plumbing_general.text: Is there active water flow causing immediate damage?
What is the exact location of the fault?

building_general.text: What type of defect is this?
Is this defect a safety risk to staff or customers?

bakery.text: Are the moving parts of the equipment operating?
Is the oven reaching and holding set temperature?
Is the heating element or burner active?

butchery.text: Are all safety covers and blade guards in place?
Are the blades or cutting mechanisms moving?
Is the vacuum sealing and suction functioning?

deli.text: Is the heating element or burner active?
Is the temperature stable and reaching set point?

fv.text: Are display lights and controls activating?

hvac.text: Is the air reaching the set temperature?
Is there water dripping or leaking?

fire.text: What is the fire safety fault?
Is there an active fire or immediate emergency?
Is the asset tagged and out of service?

pest.text: Is this in a food-prep area?

general.text: Please describe the fault in detail.
